text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #23)

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=246245
You will see super speed only on rebuild chromium same DISTVERSION, in other cases speed will decreased.

May be I will try one more time to hack ports build system to force build all ports in same dir not depend on port version/git hash.
